summary: Completed testing of Admin Activity Log / Audit Trail feature. All backend API tests pass (9/9). Frontend Activity Log tab working correctly with color-coded icons, proper entry structure, and real-time refresh after admin actions.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/audit-log returns logs with correct structure (logs array + total count)
Audit log entries have all required fields (admin_id, admin_name, action, target_type, target_id, target_name, details, created_at)
Audit logs sorted by created_at descending (newest first)
Non-admin users get 403 when accessing GET /api/admin/audit-log
POST /api/admin/verify-trader creates audit log entry with action='verified' or 'unverified'
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/role creates audit log entry with action='role_changed' and details showing old/new role
DELETE /api/admin/posts/{id} creates audit log entry with action='deleted_post'
Audit log respects limit parameter for pagination
Audit log respects skip parameter for pagination
Activity Log tab visible in Admin Dashboard with correct count badge
Activity Log entries render with color-coded icons (green=#4D7C0F for verify, red=#DC2626 for unverify/delete, orange=#B45309 for role change)
Activity Log entries show admin name, action label, target name, details, and relative timestamp (just now, 1m ago, etc.)
Activity Log refreshes after admin actions (verify, role change, delete post)
Activity Log header shows 'X ACTIONS LOGGED' count
seed_data_creation: Created test posts (TEST_AUDIT_POST_DELETE, TEST_Comment Notification Test) for delete audit log testing - these were deleted during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Log / Audit Trail feature fully tested and working. The audit_log MongoDB collection stores all admin actions with proper indexing on created_at. Frontend Activity Log tab (data-testid='admin-tab-activity') shows entries with color-coded icons based on action type. The fetchAuditLogs() function is called after each admin action to refresh the log. Empty state shows helpful message when no logs exist.
